title: How do I get the item name with the itemid using the query?
excerpt: Does anyone know a quick way to query for an item’s name using the item’s itemId and the boardId it exists in?

posts.author: ianhunter373 (IH)
posts.cookedHtml: Does anyone know a quick way to query for an item’s name using the item’s itemId and the boardId it exists in?

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ianhunter373,

You can do so using an items query as shown below (without the board ID).

query {
  items (ids: [1234567890, 9876543210, 2345678901]) {
    name
  }
}

You can read more about items here. Let us know if you have any other questions.

Best,
Rachel
